live_qa.description: Live UI QA run: 100 real emails scanned via the dashboard. 20 issues found and fixed; 20/20 targeted samples re-verified via FastAPI on 127.0.0.1:8000.
notes: Offline benchmark (metrics.accuracy) is computed on an offline test split and can exceed live accuracy.
Live inbox distributions contain more mixed-intent mail, paraphrase variance, and benign security/ops communications that affect score bands.
